allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total papers: {len\(d\)}'\); print\('Levels:', sorted\(set\(p['manufacturingLevel'] for p in d\)\)\); print\('DSS Focus:', sorted\(set\(p['dssFocus'] for p in d\)\)\); print\('Countries:', len\(set\(p['country'] for p in d\)\)\); print\('Technologies:', sorted\(set\(t for p in d for t in p['technologies']\)\)\); print\('Years:', sorted\(set\(p['year'] for p in d\)\)\)")
